scripts.slides:pdf: marp --theme-set themes/marpessa.css --pdf slides/agentic-dataviz-workshop.md -o slides/agentic-dataviz-workshop.pdf --browser-path '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
scripts.slides:pptx: marp --theme-set themes/marpessa.css --pptx slides/agentic-dataviz-workshop.md -o slides/agentic-dataviz-workshop.pptx --browser-path '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
